query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.type, a.name as atoll_name FROM places p LEFT JOIN atolls a ON p.atollId = a.id WHERE LOWER(p.name) LIKE '%fuvah%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.type, a.name as atoll_name FROM places p LEFT JOIN atolls a ON p.atollId = a.id WHERE LOWER(p.name) LIKE '%fuvah%';
